features.name: gridfinity_base_grid
features.description: 2x1 stepped chamfer base profile for baseplate interlock, with bridge plate connecting the two base units. Uses gf_base_grid() library module.

features.name: bin_shell
features.description: Thin-walled Gridfinity shell from gf_bin() library. 1.2mm walls (3 perimeters), 3.75mm outer corner radius, 2.55mm inner radius, 2.8mm internal fillet. Interior open from Z=7.0 to body top.

features.name: pocket_walls
features.description: Solid fill inside lower bin interior (Z=7.0 to Z=71.2). Creates 5.55mm-thick walls (X sides) and 10.55mm-thick walls (Y sides) surrounding the 70×18mm pocket. The visible shelf at Z=71.2 is where the pocket ends and the full bin interior opens up.

features.name: through_pocket
features.description: 70×18mm rectangular pocket from floor (Z=7.2) to pocket wall top (Z=71.2). 1.5mm corner radii. 1.5mm 45° lead-in chamfer at mouth. Caliper display body (68×16mm) drops in and rests on floor. Centered in bin XY.

features.name: open_interior
features.description: Full bin interior open at 81.1×39.1mm from pocket wall top to body top. Caliper beam (16×5mm) extends through this space. User inserts caliper through this wide opening.

features.name: stacking_lip
features.description: Standard Gridfinity stacking lip ring (4.4mm tall, 2.6mm depth). Uses gf_stacking_lip_ring() library module. Inner opening 78.3×36.3mm — wider than pocket, does not obstruct caliper.

printOrientation.bed_face: bin base (bottom of Gridfinity base profile)
printOrientation.z_direction: upward from base to stacking lip
